title: wyethia bolanderi
intro: Wyethia bolanderi, also known as Bolander's mule's ears, is a biennial or perennial plant native to the western United States, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include reducing swelling and pain, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. Wyethia bolanderi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
